title: GetIDMod
description: A simple and convenient mod for quickly obtaining item and block IDs in Minecraft!
body:
✨ Features
🔍 Instant ID Retrieval - Get the ID of any item or block in your hand instantly

🎯 Simple Command - Just one command /getid for everything

🎨 Colorful Formatting - Beautiful messages with color coding

📊 Type Information - Automatic detection of blocks vs items

🌍 Localization Support - Proper names in your language

🚫 No Config Needed - Works out of the box

🎮 How to Use
Hold any item or block in your main hand

Type the command in chat: /getid

Get information in the format:


```
Block: Stone | ID: minecraft:stone
```

```
Item: Diamond | ID: minecraft:diamond (not a block)
```

⚡ Quick Demo

```
/getid → "Block: Oak Planks | ID: minecraft:oak_planks"
/getid → "Item: Diamond Sword | ID: minecraft:diamond_sword (not a block)"
/getid → "No item in hand!" (when hand is empty)
```

🔧 Technical Information
Minecraft Versions: 1.20.1 - 1.20.6

**Mod Loader: Forge**

**Environment: Client & Server**

📦 Installation
Download the .jar file from this page

Place it in your mods folder (client/server)

Launch the game and enjoy!
